issues.description: Effect structure is fundamentally wrong. The card performs a deck search with reveal and bottom placement, not a simple SearchDeck. Missing the 'look at 5 cards' mechanic, the reveal condition, and the 'place rest at bottom' action.

SearchDeck is incorrect. The actual effect requires: (1) look at top 5 cards, (2) reveal up to 1 Red-Haired Pirates type card (other than this card), (3) add to hand, (4) place remaining cards at bottom in any order. This is a multi-step deck manipulation, not a standard search.
Second effect with trigger 'Trigger' and DrawCard action is entirely unsupported by card text. The card does not grant a draw action.
Filter is 'Any' but should restrict to {Red-Haired Pirates} type cards, excluding [Come On!! We'll Fight You!!] by name.

suggestedDsl.effectText: Look at 5 cards from the top of your deck; reveal up to 1 {Red-Haired Pirates} type card other than [Come On!! We'll Fight You!!] and add it to your hand. Then, place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order.
